name: Afrida Rohmatin
bio: Software developer based in Jakarta and Surabaya. I turn caffeine into clean code because messy code ruins my mood.

experiences.description: Led end-to-end product delivery from requirements gathering to deployment while providing 24/7 customer support to ensure reliable operations and high client satisfaction

experiences.company: Direktorat Pengembangan Teknologi dan Sistem Informasi ITS
experiences.description: Refactored MyITS StudentConnect from Laravel to Next.js, contributing 39,000+ lines of code and 300+ GitHub commits, while improving Lighthouse scores by an average of 15 points across key performance metrics
Delivered a 10-page corporate website within 3 months alongside a 3-member team, ensuring consistent branding and an optimized user experience
Contributed to 6 software projects, developing RESTful APIs, optimizing database performance, and collaborating cross-functionally to deliver scalable and user-friendly solutions
Assisted in teaching 2 integration programming courses for 62 students, providing technical guidance and helping improve problem-solving and coding proficiency

projects.name: Microscopic Mosquito Larvae Classifier
projects.description: Web-based application using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to automatically identify and classify mosquito larvae species from microscopic images

projects.name: MyITS StudentConnect
projects.description: ITS Portofolio Based Student Information System. I was implemented Golang + Next.Js migration from the PHP Laravel codebase.

projects.name: ProryVision
projects.description: A web-based dashboard procurement inventory project designed to streamline inventory management processes
